meaning: n.压榨机,磨坊,磨粉机,工厂,制造厂vt.碾磨,磨细,搅拌,使乱转,打vi.乱转,被碾磨
examples: His father worked shifts in a steel mill.
The old mill is now little more than a ruin.
The steel mill was dismantled piece by piece.
Not so long ago this mill town on the Naugatuck River was an industrial powerhouse.
Starting in 1992, the company cut 91 of the mill division's 526 white-collar jobs.
